caption.full:
Kesha collects over 1,000 human teeth and her cats' teeth.

The pop star revealed she keeps her collection of human teeth, received from fans, in jars around her home. Kesha also collects extracted teeth from her cats, calling them 'little kitty wisdom teeth'. She has even created jewelry and accessories using real teeth.

What’s the strangest collection you’d happily display in your home?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#CelebrityNews #Kesha #HumanTeeth #PopStar
caption.firstComment: I’m low-key obsessed—what part of this surprises you the most?

youtube.description:
Kesha revealed on the Call Her Daddy podcast that she collects human teeth and keeps them in jars around her home. She has received over 1,000 teeth from fans. Kesha also collects her cats' 'little kitty wisdom teeth' in addition to human teeth.
